title: Coffee House Chronicles: The Final Movie
original_title: Coffee House Chronicles: The Final Movie
overview: 10 inter-connected stories of LGBTQ+ people pursuing life and love in the modern world, from a young straight man yearning to convert, to dating veterans navigating the world during the Covid pandemic.
